channel.title: GitHub Julia Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Julia in GitHub

item.title: JuliaRegistries/General
item.description: The official registry of general Julia packages

item.title: JuliaGPU/GPUArrays.jl
item.description: Reusable array functionality for Julia's various GPU backends.

item.title: lindahua/NumericExtensions.jl
item.description: Julia extensions to provide high performance computational support

item.title: andreasKroepelin/polylux
item.description: A package for creating slides in Typst
